Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint [Ccp Section 418.10]
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT JILL QUICK-MCCROSKY'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint [Ccp Section 418.10] is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR No. 5525, e-mail: vgross@sftc.org. (L&M302)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JILL QUICK-MCCROSKY's MOTION TO VACATE VOID DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. The default entered against Ms. Quick-McCrosky on September 30, 2016 and the default judgment entered against her on April 18, 2017 are set aside.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Off Calendar
